name: Emotional Literacy
description: Understanding and naming emotions without judgment. Building vocabulary for inner experience.

name: Self-Compassion
description: Practices and perspectives for treating yourself with the same kindness you'd offer a friend.

name: Boundaries
description: Learning to set and maintain healthy boundaries as an act of self-respect.

name: Healing Practices
description: Gentle, evidence-informed practices for emotional processing and nervous system regulation.

name: Values & Meaning
description: Exploring what matters most to you and aligning daily life with deeper purpose.

name: Nervous System Awareness
description: Understanding stress responses, regulation, and the body-mind connection.

name: Relationships
description: Healthy relating patterns, communication, and connection with others.

name: Daily Rituals
description: Small, sustainable daily practices that support wellbeing without overwhelm.

name: Reflection Prompts
description: Thoughtful questions and prompts for self-inquiry and awareness.

name: Community & Support
description: Connection, shared experience, and mutual encouragement in a safe environment.

name: Growth & Mastery
description: Deepening self-knowledge and building lasting emotional resilience over time.

name: Platform Orientation
description: Understanding what the platform offers, how to use it, and what it is not.
